data.title: Greenberg Traurig ranked as a top trademark firm in WTR 1000 2026 edition with 30 recommended attorneys.
data.description: The international legal entity Greenberg Traurig, LLP has recently received acknowledgment from the World Trademark Review (WTR) in its 16th edition of the WTR 1000, with national and regional recognitions. Along with the firm's overall achievements, WTR particularly highlighted 30 lawyers within Greenberg Traurig.

data.title: Symmetry Systems introduces AI-powered features, taxonomy with data identifiers, types, and plans open source release.
data.description: Symmetry Systems, based in San Mateo, California, has introduced a range of advanced AI-driven capabilities and a taxonomy that seamlessly incorporates sensitive data identifiers, data types, and privacy frameworks. The company aims to enhance vendor conformity and foster collaboration within the industry with an upcoming open-source release. This move is anticipated to bolster consistency across vendors and encourage a unified approach within the sector. The announcement was made on January 30, 2026.

data.title: Fed Chair Powell reaffirms Fed independence amid political pressure, retains rates at 3.5%-3.75%. Declines to address criticism, stresses faith in public interest-driven decisions. Downplays significance of gold rally.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell remains confident in the central bank's position, stating that they will continue to assess data before making decisions on interest rates. The Federal Open Market Committee decided to maintain rates at 3.5%-3.75%. Powell refrained from addressing political criticisms and emphasized Fed independence, stressing that decisions are made in the public's best interest. Powell also downplayed the significance of recent gold and silver price rallies, stating they don't reflect Fed credibility issues. Powell stressed the importance of maintaining public trust in the Fed's decision-making process to ensure economic stability. This story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fed may pause rate cuts, S&P 500 fluctuates. Powell's chairmanship ends in May. Market uncertain.
data.description: Powell's term as chairman is ending on May 15, but he may continue as a Federal Reserve governor. The Federal Reserve may pause on rate cuts due to the strong economy. The S&P 500 shows fluctuations amidst this news.
Crown Point places $30M in Series IX Notes.

data.title: QWERKY AI partners with Inbox Beverage to build AI-powered brewery design platform with 8 billion parameters, reducing costs and improving efficiency.
data.description: A recently developed custom-trained model, boasting over 100 billion parameters, has been successfully implemented, showcasing the cost-effective nature of cutting-edge AI architecture. This breakthrough was announced in Columbia, South Carolina on January 30, 2026 by QWERKY AI, a prominent player in AI model enhancement and state space designs.

data.description: Hydro One Inc. is excited to share that the Society of United Professionals members have officially approved the tentative agreement made on January 12, 2026. This new agreement, which will be retroactive from October 1, 2025, is set to remain in effect until March of the...

data.title: Marathon Petroleum Corp. (NYSE: MPC) will host its annual shareholder meeting on April 29, 2026, in a virtual format.
data.description: A large oil company based in Findlay, Ohio, revealed on January 30, 2026, that its annual shareholder meeting will be held on April 29, 2026, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time. The meeting will be conducted exclusively online through a live webcast. Shareholders who are recorded as such by March 3, 2026, will have the right to participate. The company, listed under the ticker symbol MPC on the New York Stock Exchange, is Marathon Petroleum Corp.

data.title: Ecopetrol S.A. submitted Corporate Governance Report to Colombia's Financial Superintendence, fulfilling best practices for 2025.
data.description: Colombian company Ecopetrol S.A. (BVC: ECOPETROL; NYSE: EC) revealed on Jan. 30, 2026, that it has submitted its Corporate Governance Best Practices Implementation Report, also known as the "Código País," to the Financial Superintendence of Colombia. This report signifies Ecopetrol's commitment to adhering to standards for proper corporate governance. The submission of the report highlights the company's dedication to transparency and accountability, with the aim of ensuring effective leadership and management practices.

data.title: Procter & Gamble provides relief with showers and laundry services in Mississippi after winter storm, benefiting residents in Oxford and Ripley.
data.description: In Oxford and Ripley, Mississippi, starting January 30, 2026, residents have the opportunity to utilize on-site showers and Tide Loads of Hope laundry services. This initiative is available for families, individuals, and responders requiring personal care items, cleaning products, laundry services, and shower facilities. The program aims to assist those in need by offering access to essential services during this time.

data.title: Plaid Tech sends graphene to Petro Flow for well-plugging tests in the US, field tests in Q2 2026.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on Jan. 30, 2026, Plaid Technologies Inc. revealed sending an initial batch of its graphene material to Petro Flow LLC for the first field trials of graphene-enhanced wellbore cement for plugging and abandonment purposes. The test wells are scheduled for the second quarter of 2026 in the US. Plaid Technologies Inc. (CSE: STIF) (OTC: STIFF) (FRA: 5QX0) is leading this development.
